narrative:
North Canton City has 12,447 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a clear Republican lean of 6.0 percentage points.
